args.command:
config firewall address
edit "host-192.168.1.3"
set subnet 192.168.1.3 255.255.255.255
next
end
config firewall policy
edit 0
set name "BLOCK_ICMP_from_192.168.1.3"
set srcintf "Port2"
set dstintf "Port1"
set srcaddr "host-192.168.1.3"
set dstaddr "all"
set action deny
set service "PING"
set schedule "always"
set logtraffic all
next
end
